prompt: A vibrant Japanese fast-food promotional poster in glossy anime advertising style, themed around KFC and a magical princess mascot. The composition is vertical and packed but still a single unified ad scene. At center-right, a cheerful young anime woman inspired by Princess Kaguya poses energetically toward the viewer with one hand reaching forward and the other arm lifted. She has long flowing golden-blonde hair, large sparkling amber-red eyes, a bright open smile, and ornate hair accessories including red floral ornaments, dangling beads, green ribbons, and a small gold crescent-moon crown. She wears a festive kimono-inspired outfit in coral red, soft pink, cream, and olive green with layered sleeves, floral patterns, decorative cords, bows, tassels, and a wide obi with a flower knot. Her hair and sleeves sweep dramatically as if caught in a lively breeze. In the lower left foreground, show 1 large KFC bucket overflowing with 4 pieces of crispy fried chicken, rendered extra crunchy, golden, juicy, and appetizing. Along the bottom foreground, include 3 side items: 1 chicken burger with sesame bun and lettuce, 1 small carton of fries, and 1 biscuit or pie-like pastry topped with glossy syrup. Use the KFC logo in the top right and on the bucket and fries carton, with the Colonel face partially censored by a rectangular blur on the bucket. Surround the scene with celebratory red-and-gold graphics, sparkles, brushstroke flourishes, and festive Japanese New Year-like motifs. Add large bold Japanese headline text at the upper left reading ケンタッキーの魅力 in thick red characters with white and gold outline. Add 2 white brushstroke callout bubbles on the left with red text: サクッと香ばしい！ and ジューシーで大満足！. Add a red flower-shaped badge on the right reading 今日のごほうびに. Add a red bottom banner with white text listing オリジナルチキン / バーガー / ビスケット. Extremely polished commercial illustration, high saturation, warm lighting, clean line art, glossy food rendering, energetic composition, premium poster finish.
